name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: A central sector scheme that provides income support to all landholding farmers' families in the country to supplement their financial needs.
eligibility: All landholding farmers' families (subject to certain exclusion criteria).
applicationProcess: Visit the official PM Kisan portal.
Click on 'New Farmer Registration'.
Enter Aadhaar number and fill the application form.
Upload required documents and submit.

whereToApply.offline: Common Service Centres (CSC) or local Agriculture Office.

name: Ayushman Bharat (PM-JAY)
description: The world's largest health insurance scheme, providing a health cover of Rs. 5 lakhs per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.
eligibility: Families identified by the SECC 2011 data based on occupational and deprivation criteria.
applicationProcess: Check eligibility on the PM-JAY website.
Visit an empanelled hospital with required ID proofs.
The hospital will verify your identity and provide treatment.
No cash payment is required at the hospital.

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: A small deposit scheme for the girl child, launched as a part of the 'Beti Bachao Beti Padhao' campaign, offering high interest rates and tax benefits.
eligibility: Parents or legal guardians of a girl child below 10 years.
ageLimit: Girl child must be below 10 years at the time of opening the account.
documents: Birth Certificate of the girl child
charges: Minimum deposit of Rs. 250 per year.
applicationProcess: Visit any post office or authorized bank branch.
Fill the Sukanya Samriddhi Account opening form.
Submit the form with the birth certificate and ID proofs.
Make the initial deposit.

whereToApply.offline: Post Offices or authorized commercial banks.

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (PMAY)
description: An initiative to provide affordable housing to the urban and rural poor with a target of building 2 crore affordable houses.
eligibility: Families with no pucca house, belonging to EWS, LIG, or MIG categories.
charges: Nominal application fee (if applied through CSC).
applicationProcess: Visit the official PMAY portal.
Select 'Citizen Assessment' and choose the appropriate category.
Fill in the Aadhaar details and application form.
Save and submit the application.

name: PM Mudra Yojana (PMMY)
description: Provides loans up to 10 lakh to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises to help them start or expand their business.
eligibility: Any Indian citizen who has a business plan for a non-farm sector income generating activity.
documents: Quotation of machinery/items to be purchased
charges: No processing fee for Shishu loans (up to Rs. 50,000).
applicationProcess: Prepare a business plan.
Visit a nearby bank, NBFC, or MFI.
Fill the Mudra loan application form.
Submit the form with required documents.

whereToApply.offline: Public/Private Sector Banks, Regional Rural Banks, Small Finance Banks.

name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
description: A pension scheme focused on the unorganized sector, providing a guaranteed minimum pension of Rs. 1,000 to Rs. 5,000 per month after the age of 60.
eligibility: Any Indian citizen between 18 and 40 years having a savings bank account.
charges: Monthly/Quarterly/Half-yearly contribution based on age and pension amount.
applicationProcess: Visit the bank where you have a savings account.
Fill the APY registration form.
Provide Aadhaar and mobile number.
Ensure sufficient balance for auto-debit of contributions.

whereToApply.offline: Any bank where you hold a savings account.

name: PM POSHAN (Mid-Day Meal)
description: Provides hot cooked meals to children in government and government-aided schools to improve their nutritional status and encourage school attendance.
eligibility: Children studying in classes I to VIII in government and government-aided schools.
applicationProcess: Automatic enrollment for children attending government schools.
No separate application required by parents.

name: National Scholarship Portal (NSP)
description: A one-stop solution for various scholarship schemes offered by Central and State governments for students from class 1 to Ph.D.
eligibility: Students belonging to SC, ST, OBC, Minority, or EWS categories (varies by specific scholarship).
applicationProcess: Register on the National Scholarship Portal.
Login and fill the application form for the eligible scheme.
Upload required documents.
Submit and track the application status.

name: PM Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
description: A national mission for financial inclusion to ensure access to financial services, namely, basic savings & deposit accounts, remittance, credit, insurance, and pension.
eligibility: Any Indian citizen who does not have a bank account.
applicationProcess: Visit any bank branch or Bank Mitr outlet.
Fill the account opening form.
Submit the form with ID and address proof.
Receive the RuPay debit card.

whereToApply.offline: Any bank branch or Business Correspondent (Bank Mitr) outlets.

name: PM Vaya Vandana Yojana
description: A pension scheme exclusively for senior citizens aged 60 years and above, offering a guaranteed rate of return for 10 years.
eligibility: Senior citizens aged 60 years and above.
charges: Purchase price (investment) varies based on the pension amount chosen.
applicationProcess: Visit the LIC website or any LIC branch.
Fill the application form for PMVVY.
Submit the form with the investment amount.
Choose the frequency of pension payment (Monthly/Quarterly/Half-yearly/Yearly).

whereToApply.offline: Life Insurance Corporation (LIC) of India branches.
